parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ r2_file_key: $json.body.r2FileKey, episode_title: $json.body.episodeTitle, episode_description: $json.body.episodeDescription, status: 'processing' }) }}

nodes.name: Create Job Record
nodes.notes: Supabase: Create job record. NEEDS: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY env var

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $("Webhook Trigger").first().json.body.chatId || 1375806243, text: "🎙️ Content Studio started for: " + $("Webhook Trigger").first().json.body.episodeTitle + "\nProcessing your episode now. I will update you at each step.", parse_mode: "HTML" }) }}

nodes.name: Generate R2 Presigned URL
nodes.notes: Passes through r2Url from webhook or builds from file key

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.episodeTitle, description: $json.episodeDescription, audio_url: $json.r2PublicUrl, published: false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ buzzsprout_episode_id: String($json.id) }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ audio_url: $("Generate R2 Presigned URL").first().json.r2PublicUrl, auto_highlights: true, speech_models: ["universal-2"], word_boost: ["Maidment", "Emma Maidment", "Flowlane", "Flow Lane"], custom_spelling: [{ from: ["Maidman", "Maidmen", "Maiden", "Maidon"], to: "Maidment" }, { from: ["Flow Lane", "Flowlane"], to: "Flow Lane" }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 4096, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are Emma Maidment writing a blog post for your website flowstatescollective.com. Write in first person as Emma. Use I, my, we (when referring to your community). Never write about Emma in third person. IMPORTANT: Never use em dashes. No hashtags. Write a detailed SEO blog post based on this podcast transcript.
Episode title: ' + $('Generate R2 Presigned URL').first().json.episodeTitle + '
Transcript: ' + $('Poll AssemblyAI').first().json.text + '

Format as:
- Compelling intro paragraph
- 3-5 main sections with H2 headings
- Key takeaways section
- Call to action to listen to the full episode
Keep it 800-1200 words. Tone: warm, practical, empowering.

At the end of the blog post, include this section exactly:

🎧 Listen to the full episode: ' + ($('Upload to Buzzsprout').first().json.url || '') + '
Follow Emma on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/emmamaidment
Subscribe on Substack: https://emmamaidment.substack.com

IMPORTANT: Never use em dashes (—) in the writing. Use commas, colons, or rewrite sentences instead.' }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $('Generate R2 Presigned URL').first().json.episodeTitle, content: $json.htmlContent, status: 'draft' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ wordpress_post_url: $json.link }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 4096, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are Emma Maidment writing a personal newsletter post for your Substack. Write in first person as Emma, warm and conversational, like writing to a close friend. Use I, my, you (addressing the reader directly). Never write about Emma in third person. IMPORTANT: Never use em dashes. No hashtags. Write a Substack newsletter post based on this podcast episode.
Episode title: ' + $('Generate R2 Presigned URL').first().json.episodeTitle + '
Transcript: ' + $('Poll AssemblyAI').first().json.text + '

Format as a personal, conversational newsletter post.
Include: hook opener, 3 key insights from the episode, personal reflection, link to listen.
Tone: warm, direct, like writing to a friend. 600-800 words.

At the end include:
🎧 Listen to the full episode: ' + ($('Upload to Buzzsprout').first().json.url || '') + '
📖 Read the blog post: ' + ($('Post to WordPress').first().json.link || '') + '
Follow Emma on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/emmamaidment

IMPORTANT: Never use em dashes (—) in the writing. Use commas, colons, or rewrite sentences instead.' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are Emma Maidment writing a LinkedIn post in your own voice. Write in first person as Emma. Professional but warm and direct. Use I, my, I am. Max 200 words. No hashtags. Never write about Emma in third person. IMPORTANT: Never use em dashes. Write about this podcast episode.
Episode title: ' + $('Generate R2 Presigned URL').first().json.episodeTitle + '
Transcript summary: ' + ($('Poll AssemblyAI').first().json.text || '').substring(0, 500) + '

Format: Hook line, 3 key insights as short punchy lines, CTA to listen. Max 200 words. No hashtags. Tone: professional but warm, Emma's voice.

End with a link to listen: 🎧 ' + ($('Upload to Buzzsprout').first().json.url || '') + '

IMPORTANT: Never use em dashes (—) in the writing. Use commas, colons, or rewrite sentences instead.' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'completed', substack_draft: $('Generate Substack Draft').first().json.content[0].text, linkedin_post: $('Generate LinkedIn Post').first().json.content[0].text, transcript_text: $('Poll AssemblyAI').first().json.text.substring(0, 10000), blog_post: $('Generate Blog Post').first().json.content[0].text, clip_selections: JSON.stringify((() => { try { return $('Poll Clip Status').first().json.clips || []; } catch(e) { return []; } })()), clip_job_id: (() => { try { return $('Generate Clips').first().json.job_id; } catch(e) { return null; } })(), linkedin_post_url: 'https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/' + ($('Post to LinkedIn').first().json.id || ''), youtube_url: 'https://youtu.be/' + ($('Upload to YouTube').first().json.id || '') }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $('Generate R2 Presigned URL').first().json.chatId || 1375806243, text: '✅ Content Studio Complete — ' + $('Generate R2 Presigned URL').first().json.episodeTitle + '

Here's what's ready:
🎙️ Buzzsprout: Episode uploaded (draft)
📝 Blog post: Published to WordPress
📧 Substack: Draft ready
✅ LinkedIn: Posted — https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/' + ($('Post to LinkedIn').first().json.id || '') + '
🎬 YouTube: Unlisted — https://youtu.be/' + ($('Upload to YouTube').first().json.id || '') + '

✂️ Clips:
' + (() => { try { const j = $('Poll Clip Status').first().json; if (j.clips && j.clips.length) return j.clips.map((c,i) => (i+1) + '. ' + (c.hook_title || 'Clip') + ': ' + c.public_url).join('
'); return 'No clips generated'; } catch(e) { return 'Clips unavailable'; } })(), parse_mode: 'HTML' }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, jobId: $('Generate R2 Presigned URL').first().json.jobId }) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 2048, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a viral content strategist. Analyse this podcast transcript and identify the best segments for short-form social media clips.

Episode: ' + $('Generate R2 Presigned URL').first().json.episodeTitle + '
Transcript: ' + ($('Poll AssemblyAI').first().json.text || '').substring(0, 8000) + '

Select 5-8 segments that would make great 30-90 second clips. Each segment must have a strong hook in the first 5 seconds.

Return ONLY a JSON array, no other text:
[{
  "start_time": "MM:SS",
  "end_time": "MM:SS",
  "hook_title": "Short punchy title",
  "virality_score": 7,
  "caption_text": "Caption for this clip",
  "why_it_works": "One sentence explanation"
}]

Prioritise: controversial takes, actionable advice, emotional moments, surprising stats, story arcs with payoff.' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ video_url: $('Generate R2 Presigned URL').first().json.r2PublicUrl, r2_file_key: $('Generate R2 Presigned URL').first().json.r2FileKey, episode_title: $('Generate R2 Presigned URL').first().json.episodeTitle, transcript: $('Poll AssemblyAI').first().json.words, num_clips: 5, caption_style: { font: 'Montserrat Bold', font_size: 48, color: '#FFFFFF', outline_color: '#000000', outline_width: 2, position: 'bottom', highlight_color: '#FFD700', animation: 'word_by_word' } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ clip_job_id: $('Generate Clips').first().json.job_id, clip_selections: JSON.stringify($json.clips || []) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ r2_file_key: $json.body.r2FileKey, episode_title: $json.body.episodeTitle, episode_description: $json.body.episodeDescription, status: 'processing' }) }}
